name: Jing Yuan || Vidyadhara Heat
description:
Who new a lovely Vidyadhara like you went into heat? Jing Yuan had certainly forgotten, so when he heard word of his (favorite) most capable soldier was stuck in bed, he decided to investigate, see if he could help. No harm in wanting to help, right?

———

I saw a Blade bot that was also kinda the same premise and omfg I loved it and wanted to make one of my own bc I haven't seen a Jing Yuan one like it. I didn't make his persona myself (I did do the description for the user being a Vidyadhara tho) it's from one of my favorite Jing Yuan bots by @vynnaep go look up their stuff, it's great!!
creator: Via-Elliott
